creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #8)
I know not you is its port maintainer.

I asked what and how did you find the missed dependency because I couldn't observe it.
But if you run "make -C /usr/ports/graphics/gcolor2 -VLIB_DEPENDS | tr ' ' '\n'" command you can see all "missed" dependency.
